title: HESP shared schema definitions
description: Reusable identifiers, response codes, and missing-value sentinels for the Household Economic Security Panel. Numeric fields remain numeric in the flat table. Reserved negative values distinguish structural skips, refusals, unknowns, and values not collected in a partial interview.

not_applicable.title: Not applicable / structural skip
not_applicable.description: The questionnaire routing determined that the variable was outside the respondent universe.

refused.title: Refused
refused.description: The respondent explicitly declined to answer.

dont_know.title: Don't know / unavailable
dont_know.description: The respondent did not know the value or it could not be determined.

not_collected.title: Not collected / processing missing
not_collected.description: The item was in universe but was not collected or was unavailable after processing.

household_id.title: Household identifier
household_id.description: Stable household identifier formatted 'HH' followed by eight digits.

person_id.title: Person identifier
person_id.description: Person identifier nested under a household identifier.

record_id.title: Household-wave record identifier
record_id.description: Household identifier followed by '_W' and a two-digit wave number.

date_iso.title: Calendar date
date_iso.description: Calendar date in YYYY-MM-DD form. Calendar-day validity beyond the regular expression is an application-level check.

survey_weight.title: Survey analysis weight
survey_weight.description: Nonnegative analysis weight. A value of zero denotes a record outside the corresponding analytic panel.
